name: Turned Wood Accent Table with Shelf Natural - Threshold™
description:
Style your home with the natural charm of this Turned Wood Accent Table with Shelf from Threshold™. This light brown accent table features a 19.25-inch round tabletop with a natural wood finish that brings warm, rustic appeal to your home. Standing 20.25 inches high on decorative turned wood legs, it includes a built-in bottom shelf for extra storage or display space. Place this round accent table alongside your sofa or armchair to hold drinks, books or decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
